name: US Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Florida-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales, and firearms transactions across 3 Broward and Miami locations with expert appraisals.
description_long: US Pawn & Jewelry is an established pawn shop operator with multiple locations throughout South Florida, serving the Broward and Miami markets. The company positions itself as a full-service pawn operation specializing in quick cash loans secured by personal valuables, as well as retail buying and selling of merchandise. US Pawn maintains FFL (Federal Firearms License) credentials and specializes in both vintage and modern firearms including Class III weapons, distinguishing it from standard pawn shops in compliance and inventory depth. The company's service model emphasizes expert appraisals conducted by experienced specialists, flexible loan terms tailored to individual circumstances, and secure confidential transactions. They offer multiple engagement channels including in-person visits across three convenient South Florida locations, online shopping capabilities, and phone consultations for personalized guidance. Customer testimonials highlight professional treatment, fair pricing, timely service completion, and clean, well-maintained store facilities with accessible parking. The core business model relies on collateral-based lending where customers can secure quick cash using valuable items as collateral, positioning it as an alternative financial solution for customers needing immediate funds without credit checks. Their merchandise categories span luxury goods, vehicles, jewelry, fine watches, electronics, and photographic equipment, indicating a broad inventory management operation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: FFL-licensed firearms dealer specializing in vintage, modern, and Class III weapons with knowledge of estate and collection purchases
Three convenient South Florida locations in Broward and Miami markets reducing travel friction for customers
Expert in-house appraisers conducting comprehensive evaluations to determine fair collateral-based loan offers
Flexible loan terms tailored to individual financial circumstances rather than one-size-fits-all pricing
Online shopping capability and phone consultation options alongside in-person transactions
Customer reviews consistently mention respectful treatment, fair pricing, and timely service completion
Secure and confidential transaction handling as core stated business principle
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to South Florida (3 locations in Broward/Miami only) with no expansion information provided
Pawn loans inherently require surrendering valuable collateral, carrying risk of permanent loss if loan terms cannot be met
Website lacks specific information about loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or renewal policies that impact consumer decision-making
No mention of regulatory compliance details, licensing status verification, or dispute resolution processes despite handling high-value items
Firearms inventory and specialization may deter customers uncomfortable with those product categories despite broader service offerings
best_for: South Florida residents with valuable items (jewelry, watches, electronics, firearms) needing quick cash without credit checks
Collectors or estate executors seeking fair appraisals and bulk sales of vintage or modern firearms and luxury goods
Individuals who prefer in-person evaluation and negotiation for high-value collateral-based loans over automated lending platforms
diagnosis: US Pawn & Jewelry is best for South Florida residents with valuable collateral who need quick cash and prefer in-person evaluation over automated lending. The primary caveat is the geographic limitation to 3 South Florida locations and the absence of published loan terms, rates, and conditions that should be verified before engagement.
services: Pawn loans secured by valuable collateral with flexible terms
Expert item appraisals for jewelry, watches, electronics, firearms, and luxury goods
Retail purchase of firearms (FFL-licensed, including Class III weapons)
Retail sale of pre-owned jewelry and fine watches
Estate and collection purchase services (firearms, luxury goods)
Online shopping platform for merchandise inventory
Phone consultation services for appraisals and advice
In-person transactions at three South Florida locations
Multiple payment method options for fund disbursement
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
